name: LifeMD, Inc.
business: LifeMD is a patient-centric, direct-to-patient healthcare company providing a high-quality, cost-effective, and convenient way for patients to access virtual medical care and pharmacy services. As of December 31, 2025, LifeMD served approximately 328,000 active patient subscribers across a range of healthcare needs, including primary care, men’s and women’s health, hormone health, weight management, insomnia, dermatology and cardiology.

exposures.sentence: LifeMD is a patient-centric, direct-to-patient healthcare company providing a high-quality, cost-effective, and convenient way for patients to access virtual medical care and pharmacy services.
We have been an early adopter of AI and large language models (LLMs) to integrate and analyze data across the Company.
Risk factors include, by way of example and without limitation: ... our ability to prevent, detect and remediate cybersecurity incidents;

catalysts.event: Expand insurance coverage to approximately 230 million lives
catalysts.sentence: By June 1, 2026, we expect to expand coverage to approximately 230 million lives, representing approximately 80% of commercially insured lives in the U.S., 70% of Medicare Advantage beneficiaries, and Medicare Fee-for-Service beneficiaries.

tamClaims.claim: 59.3 million adults in the U.S. were living with a mental illness in 2022, yet only 50.6% received treatment
tamClaims.sentence: According to the National Institute of Mental Health, approximately 59.3 million adults in the U.S. were living with a mental illness in 2022, yet only 50.6% received treatment.

tamClaims.claim: Spending on digital solutions to facilitate greater access to end markets accounts for one-third of the collective $30 billion commercial spend by healthcare product companies in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated that spending on digital solutions to facilitate greater access to end markets accounts for one-third of the collective $30 billion commercial spend by these companies in the U.S.
